video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. 林澈走到门前，凑近猫眼, 通过猫眼看到空荡荡的走廊, 走廊灯一盏接一盏熄灭，陷入黑暗, 林澈后退，呼吸急促. Narration: "他走到猫眼前，走廊空着，灯却一盏一盏熄灭。". 林澈 says: "有人在外面。". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of young man's eye pressed against peephole, distorted view of empty hallway, lights going out one by one, darkening corridor, claustrophobic, horror atmosphere, high contrast, film noir style. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: Use video prompt + context keyframes for img2vid conditioning. Copy 'video_prompt' into your video tool. Use 'available' context_refs images as start-frame conditioning for shot-to-shot visual continuity.
